message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

actor User as user1
participant "Frontend" as frontend1
boundary "API Gateway" as gateway1

package MatchingService {
    participant Controller as controller1
    participant Service as service1
    
}


database QuestionsDB <<Questions>> 
database MatchRequestsDB <<MatchRequests>> 

== Request Initiation ==
activate user1
frontend1 ->> gateway1 : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}\n
gateway1->controller1  :PUT /api/find/match \npayload:{requestID}
deactivate user1



service1 --> matchRequestDb :"find another MatchRequest"\nmesssage:"another MatchRequest"
matchRequestDb-->service1:m get a random question\message Question""
create sessionInfo and attach to each MatchRequest
update the two requests in db 


@enduml
